title: Department of Conservation and Energy; powers of the secretary
doc_html:
§504. Department of Conservation and Energy; powers of the secretary

            The secretary of the Department of Conservation and Energy shall administer, enforce and carry out the powers, duties and functions transferred to him by Part II of this Chapter or otherwise vested in him by this Chapter.

            Added by Acts 1973, Ex.Sess., No. 16, §1, emerg. eff. Dec. 8, 1973, at 9:55 A.M.; Acts 2025, No. 458, §1, eff. Oct. 1, 2025.
doc_text:
§504.  Department of Conservation and Energy; powers of the secretary
The secretary of the Department of Conservation and Energy shall administer, enforce
and carry out the powers, duties and functions transferred to him by Part II of this Chapter
or otherwise vested in him by this Chapter.
Added by Acts 1973, Ex.Sess., No. 16, §1, emerg.  eff. Dec. 8, 1973, at 9:55 A.M.;
Acts 2025, No. 458, §1, eff. Oct. 1, 2025.
